title: Volkswagen CFO addresses plant closures, job losses as profits sink
summary_full: German auto giant Volkswagen on Friday reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter profit and revised down its sales forecast for 2026.
summary_public: German auto giant Volkswagen on Friday reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter profit and revised down its sales forecast for 2026.

DE.label: neutral
